mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS id, c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.contract_attr AS contractAttr, p.product_name AS productName, p.brand_number AS brandNumber, p.factory_name AS factoryName, c.company_name AS companyName, p.warehouse_name AS warehouseAddr, p.deal_number AS dealNumber, p.deal_price AS dealPrice, c.contract_time AS buyDate, c.pay_full_time AS payTime, TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, c.contract_time, now()) AS inWarehouseHours, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.match_user_id AS matchUserId, IFNULL(r1.deal_number, 0) AS salesNumber, ( p.deal_number - IFNULL(r1.deal_number, 0) ) AS remainNumber, ( ( p.deal_number - IFNULL(r1.deal_number, 0) ) * p.deal_price ) AS overplusPrice, c.dept_id AS deptId, IF(s.total_amount!='',IF(IFNULL((p1.deal_number*p1.deal_price/s.total_amount*s.dealed_amount)>=p.deal_number*p.deal_price,0), 0,p.deal_number*p.deal_price-IFNULL((p1.deal_number*p1.deal_price/s.total_amount*s.dealed_amount),0)),p.deal_number*p.deal_price) As occupation FROM t_ctr_contract AS c, t_ctr_product AS p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.buy_product_id, r.sell_product_id, r.sell_contract_id, sum(r.deal_number) AS deal_number FROM t_ctr_contract_rela AS r GROUP BY r.buy_product_id ) AS r1 ON p.id = r1.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON s.id = r1.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON r1.sell_product_id = p1.id WHERE p.ctr_contract_id = c.id AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_status != 'C'
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC
ORDER BY c.contract_time ASC
ORDER BY c.contract_time DESC

SELECT SUM(p.deal_number) AS dealNumberTotal, SUM(IFNULL(r1.deal_number,0)) AS salesNumberTotal, SUM(p.deal_number - IFNULL(r1.deal_number,0)) AS remainNumberTotal, SUM((p.deal_number - IFNULL(r1.deal_number,0))*p.deal_price) AS overplusPriceTotal, SUM(IF(s.dealed_amount>=p.deal_number*p.deal_price,0,p.deal_number*p.deal_price-s.dealed_amount)) As occupation FROM t_ctr_contract AS c, t_ctr_product AS p LEFT JOIN (SELECT r.buy_product_id,r.sell_product_id,r.sell_contract_id, sum(r.deal_number) AS deal_number FROM t_ctr_contract_rela AS r GROUP BY r.buy_product_id) AS r1 ON p.id = r1.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON s.id = r1.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product p1 ON r1.sell_product_id = p1.id WHERE p.ctr_contract_id = c.id AND c.contract_type = 'B' AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_status != 'C'

SELECT c.contract_no AS contractNo, c.match_user_name AS matchUserName, c.company_name AS companyName, p.deal_number AS salesNumber, p.deal_price AS dealPrice, p.total_price AS totalPrice, p.remain_number AS remainNumber, c.pay_full_time AS deliveryDateFrom, c.delivery_date_to AS deliveryDateTo, c.bill_flg AS billFlg, c.delivery_mode AS deliveryMode, c.delivery_type AS deliveryType, c.transport_amount AS transportAmount FROM t_ctr_contract_rela AS r, t_ctr_contract AS c, t_ctr_product AS p WHERE r.sell_contract_id = c.id AND r.sell_product_id = p.id AND r.buy_product_id = #{productId}

SELECT p.product_name AS statisticsType,SUM(p.deal_number) AS dealNumber,SUM(p.total_price) AS totalPrice FROM t_ctr_contract c,t_ctr_product p WHERE c.id = p.ctr_contract_id AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_status != 'C'
GROUP BY p.product_name
ORDER BY SUM(p.deal_number) ASC
ORDER BY SUM(p.deal_number) DESC
ORDER BY SUM(p.deal_number) DESC

SELECT c.company_name AS statisticsType,SUM(p.deal_number) AS dealNumber,SUM(p.total_price) AS totalPrice FROM t_ctr_contract c,t_ctr_product p WHERE c.id = p.ctr_contract_id AND c.contract_type = #{contractType} AND c.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND c.contract_status != 'C'
GROUP BY c.company_name
ORDER BY SUM(p.deal_number) ASC
ORDER BY SUM(p.deal_number) DESC
ORDER BY SUM(p.deal_number) DESC
